Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze the Request Input A detailed natural language description of a multinational supply chain process for a consumer electronics manufacturer smartphones Task Generate 20 thought provoking open ended questions about this process Constraints Focus on insights potential issues strategies for improvement and implications of decisions Do NOT provide SQL queries Just list the questions Goal The questions should be high quality stimulating critical thinking about the described scenario

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Process Description Stages RD to Sourcing Taiwan Japan South Korea Germany US to Assembly Malaysia to Logistics Transport Air Sea Customs Insurance to Distribution Regional DCs to Retail Consumer Key Themes International coordination lead times quality metrics contractual terms 24 7 manufacturing quality checks packaging transportation modes air vs sea JIT vs aggregated shipments inventory management sales forecasting regulatory compliance environmental labor warranty after sales recalls continuous improvement multi currency time zone digital systems data analytics ML Challenges Risks Supply disruptions quality control logistics delays regulatory changes demand volatility cost optimization sustainability carbon footprint

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Brainstorming Categories for Questions Risk Management and Resilience Technology and Data Analytics Sustainability and Ethics Logistics and Transportation Inventory and Demand Planning Quality and Compliance Strategic Sourcing and Supplier Relations Financial and Operational Efficiency

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Drafting Questions aiming for 20 Risk What happens if Taiwan has an earthquake How to mitigate single source risks Tech How effective is the ML model really What data is missing Sustainability How to reduce carbon footprint without increasing costs Logistics Air vs Sea trade offs during peak seasons Inventory JIT risks in volatile markets Quality How to handle recalls across different regions Compliance Labor laws in Malaysia vs sourcing countries Strategy Nearshoring vs offshoring assembly Finance Currency fluctuation impacts Customer Direct to consumer vs Retailer balance RD How design choices impact supply chain complexity Supplier Managing relationships with multiple international suppliers Data Silos between logistics partners and internal systems After sales Warranty logistics across borders Continuous Improvement How to measure success beyond cost Regulatory Changing trade tariffs impact Automation Impact of automation on workforce in Malaysia Forecasting Handling black swan events in demand planning Packaging Sustainability of packaging materials Integration How well do digital systems integrate with legacy supplier systems

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Refining and Polishing Questions Making them thought provoking and open ended

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Review against Constraints 20 questions Yes Thought provoking Open ended Yes No SQL Yes Based on the text Yes

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Final Polish Check for variety and depth The list looks good It covers risk tech ethics logistics finance strategy and operations
